species.notes: Comparator support only. Reindeer remains visible for ancient cervid context, not for domesticated-core inference.

species_manifest.scientific_scope: Reindeer is comparator support only and must not be used as domesticated-core evidence.
species_manifest.runtime_scope: Current runtime normalization and reporting remain human AADR-first until species-specific collectors and archive bridges are implemented.

support_statement: Ancient material is curated only as comparator support and must not be flattened into domesticated-core inference.

pending_projects.paper_title: Ancient reindeer mitogenomes reveal island-hopping colonisation of the Arctic archipelagos
pending_projects.notes: Ancient reindeer comparator retained for Arctic cervid context and kept out of domesticated-core inference.
pending_projects.nordic_relevance_reason: The ancient Svalbard reindeer comparator is a real Nordic lead, but it is still not promoted into shipped mapped animal locality outputs.
